notes: v339 — UNDO NOW STICKS: RESTORED POSITIONS NO LONGER INSTANTLY SELL AGAIN. Yesterday's ↩ Undo could look like it did nothing — because your auto-sell rules are switched on, and the moment a restored position came back, the same rule (in this case the “sell after N days held” time-stop, which counts from the original buy date) sold it straight back. Fixed: when you restore a position, its auto-sell is now PAUSED so a rule can't immediately close it again — it stays put. Your rules themselves are untouched, and every other holding still follows them normally. When you're ready to hand a restored position back to your rules, just set a 🎯 target or 🛑 stop on it and the pause lifts. So now: open 💼 Portfolio → green banner up top → ↩ Restore all (or 📜 Trade history → ↩ Undo on individual ones), and they'll actually stay. If a restored share later isn't auto-selling and you want it to, that's the pause — set a 🎯/🛑 on it to re-arm. Hard-refresh to load v339. ALSO RECENT — v338 — ↩ Undo auto-sells added (restore positions your rules closed, from Trade history or a Restore-all banner), and the share row was tidied (News + Technicals moved into the 🔬 Deep dive). ALSO RECENT — v337 — fixed the app freezing / running very slow on a big market. ALSO RECENT — v336 — the 📋 Signal report card gained a 🖨 Save / print button and a lesson on reading it & the 🪜 ladder. (Older notes live in the Owner's Manual changelog.)
